languages.text: Один из специалистов попросил Лорда-капитана навестить Сектор Бионика и разобраться с ситуацией, из-за которой прервалась работа отсека.
One of the prime experts has asked the Lord Captain to visit the Sector Bionica and deal with a situation that has disrupted the work of the compartment.
languages.original_text: Один из специалистов попросил Лорда-капитана навестить Сектор Бионика и разобраться с ситуацией, из-за которой прервалась работа отсека.

languages.text: 一位首席专家请求舰长大人亲临仿生区，处理一起干扰舱室正常运作的异常事件。
languages.original_text: One of the prime experts has asked the Lord Captain to visit the Sector Bionica and deal with a situation that has disrupted the work of the compartment.

traits.locale_text: 一位首席专家请求舰长大人亲临仿生区，处理一起干扰舱室正常运作的异常事件。

languages.text: Uno de los principales expertos ha pedido {mf|al|a la} Lord Capitán que visite el Sector Bionica para lidiar con una situación que ha interrumpido el trabajo del compartimento.
languages.original_text: One of the prime experts has asked the Lord Captain to visit the Sector Bionica and deal with a situation that has disrupted the work of the compartment.

traits.locale_text: Uno de los principales expertos ha pedido {mf|al|a la} Lord Capitán que visite el Sector Bionica para lidiar con una situación que ha interrumpido el trabajo del compartimento.

languages.text: L'un des experts a demandé {mf|au seigneur-capitaine|à la seigneure-capitaine} de se rendre dans le secteur Bionica afin d'y régler un problème entravant le bon fonctionnement du compartiment.
languages.original_text: One of the prime experts has asked the Lord Captain to visit the Sector Bionica and deal with a situation that has disrupted the work of the compartment.

traits.locale_text: L'un des experts a demandé {mf|au seigneur-capitaine|à la seigneure-capitaine} de se rendre dans le secteur Bionica afin d'y régler un problème entravant le bon fonctionnement du compartiment.

languages.text: Baş uzmanlardan biri, Lord Kaptan'ın Sektör Biyonika'yı ziyaret etmesini ve kompartımanın çalışmalarını aksatan bir durumla ilgilenmesini istedi.
languages.original_text: One of the prime experts has asked the Lord Captain to visit the Sector Bionica and deal with a situation that has disrupted the work of the compartment.

traits.locale_text: Baş uzmanlardan biri, Lord Kaptan'ın Sektör Biyonika'yı ziyaret etmesini ve kompartımanın çalışmalarını aksatan bir durumla ilgilenmesini istedi.

languages.text: Einer der führenden Experten hat den Lord Captain gebeten, sich in Sektor Bionica eines Problems anzunehmen, das die Arbeit des Moduls behindert.
languages.original_text: One of the prime experts has asked the Lord Captain to visit the Sector Bionica and deal with a situation that has disrupted the work of the compartment.

traits.locale_text: Einer der führenden Experten hat den Lord Captain gebeten, sich in Sektor Bionica eines Problems anzunehmen, das die Arbeit des Moduls behindert.

languages.text: セカンド・サージュンの1人が、ロド・キャプテンに、バイオニカ・セクターを訪れて、メッドベイの業務を妨げている状況に対処するよう依頼した。
languages.original_text: One of the Chirurgeons Secundaris has asked the Lord Captain to visit the Sector Bionica and deal with a situation that has disrupted the work of the medbay.

traits.locale_text: セカンド・サージュンの1人が、ロド・キャプテンに、バイオニカ・セクターを訪れて、メッドベイの業務を妨げている状況に対処するよう依頼した。
